reason: All steps executed successfully - agent used GitHub tool to retrieve username after account access was granted
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with agent sidebar visible
Step 2: Found "QA-20260331-000754-g8sq" agent in sidebar with status "idle" and clicked it — Agent page opened, displaying the conversation landing page
Step 3: Verified agent status — Status was "idle" as required
Step 4: Typed message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." in the input field — Message appeared in the text box
Step 5: Clicked "Send message" button — Message was sent, agent status changed to "working", and a new session "GitHub Username Verification Request" was created
Step 5a: Waited for account access card and clicked GitHub checkbox — Card appeared asking for GitHub account access, checkbox became checked
Step 5b: Clicked "Grant Access (1)" button — GitHub account access was granted, agent resumed processing (status changed back to "working")
Step 5c: Waited for API request review card and clicked "Allow" button — Another request card appeared for GET /user API call, "Allow" button was clicked
Step 6: Waited for agent response — Agent processed the request and returned a response after approximately 40 seconds total
Step 7: Verified response includes GitHub username — Response clearly states "Your GitHub username is yiw190" with status now "idle"
Step 7a: Took screenshot of final response — Screenshot shows the complete conversation flow and the GitHub username "yiw190" in the final message
